message:
perf(core): add lock-free AtomicU8 cache for DegradationFsm level reads

Replace the mutex-locked level() path with a relaxed AtomicU8 cache that
is updated on each tick(). This eliminates contention on the hot path
where BackpressureGate.check() is called per-request; level() no longer
acquires the FSM mutex at all.

Changes:
- Add From<DegradationLevel> for u8 conversion impl
- Add level_cache AtomicU8 field initialized from starting level
- level() now reads from atomic cache instead of locking mutex
- tick() stores new level into cache after state transition
- Add 5M-iteration hot-loop regression test proving the gate
  sustains full throughput without lock contention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
